intro: Pick a tier that fits your budget and how detailed you want the piece to be. Examples below show the kind of result you can expect at each level.

tiers.name: Tier 1
tiers.bestFor: Fun sketches, memes, and simple character ideas

tiers.name: Tier 2
tiers.bestFor: Character portraits and polished fan art

tiers.name: Tier 3
tiers.bestFor: Showpiece commissions and complex character art

footer:
Prices are a starting point — final quotes depend on character complexity, number of characters, and usage.
Message Kirsty to discuss your idea.
